meaning: vt.使成颗粒状 使成团,把...制成丸
examples: Waste Recycling Machine: Two-stage screw to extrude and pelletize.
The special disc-type pelletize in steel works is the indispensable equipment in palletizing process.
CA Cement Clinker is a manufactured commodity which raw materials are high quality limestone and bauxite. The raw materials should be mixed according to suitable ratio to pelletize.
